name: playwright

scripts.test:normal: npm run lint && cross-env HEADLESS=false playwright test
scripts.test:parallel: npm run lint && cross-env HEADLESS=true playwright test --workers=50%
scripts.test:headless: npm run lint && cross-env HEADLESS=true playwright test
scripts.test:debug: npm run lint && cross-env PWDEBUG=1 HEADLESS=false playwright test --workers=1
scripts.test:ci: npm run lint && cross-env CI=true HEADLESS=true playwright test --reporter=line

description: Playwright TypeScript POC with POM pattern
